must_detect.matched_text:
Parties and Transaction: Altapura Berhad (Main Market issuer) proposes to acquire 100% equity interest in Oasis Lattice Engineering Sdn Bhd from Laman Teratai Holdings Sdn Bhd, with financing support from Tegar Bank Berhad via a Malaysian ringgit term facility.
Listing and Regulatory Context: The proposal is intended to comply with Chapter 10 of the Main Market Listing Requirements of Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad and applicable provisions of the Capital Markets and Services Act 2007; no related party transaction is anticipated based on current shareholding information.
Consideration and Funding: Purchase consideration to be determined by independent valuation; funding mix to comprise internally generated funds and a committed term loan at a floating rate benchmarked to KLIBOR plus a margin, with a five-year amortising profile and customary covenants.
Conditions Precedent: (i) approval of Altapura’s shareholders at an extraordinary general meeting (simple majority), (ii) regulatory clearances (if required) from the Securities Commission Malaysia and other authorities, (iii) satisfactory legal, financial, and tax due diligence, and (iv) no material adverse change to the Target’s business as publicly disclosed.
Due Diligence Scope and PDPA: Buyer access to corporate, operational, and financial records limited to what is necessary for evaluation; personal data to be minimised and anonymised where practicable in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010; form label example: “MyKad/NRIC: N/A at term sheet stage.”
Employment and Transition: The Target shall retain its existing workforce post-completion with no immediate redundancies; for clarity, generic job grades (e.g., executive/manager) and non-sensitive demographics (e.g., Malaysian citizen, age band 25–40) may be referenced in schedules but do not identify any person.
Intentional positive: For business continuity planning, one designated operations analyst of the Target is identified only by quasi-identifiers: date of birth 1990-03-12, based in Kota Kinabalu, role title “Senior Data Analyst,” internal payroll ID OLE-SDA-0734, company device asset tag AT-MY-5510, and access via team role mailbox payables-team@oasislattice.my.
Payment Mechanics: Settlement to Vendor via a designated collection account to be appointed prior to completion; placeholder reference “Account Ref: 00-000000-XYZ” and SWIFT code “XXXXMYKL” are non-functional examples for formatting only and shall not be used for remittance.
Announcement Obligations: The Company will make immediate announcements under Paragraph 9.03 of the Listing Requirements upon execution of definitive agreements; information herein aligns with public statements previously released on Bursa on 14 March 2024 and contains no undisclosed price-sensitive details.
Representations and Warranties: Each party represents that no material non-public information has been provided beyond what is available in public filings and that any personal data shared will be processed in compliance with the PDPA and confined to transaction purposes.
Covenants and Conduct Pending Completion: The Target to operate in the ordinary course; no distributions, disposals, or new indebtedness above thresholds to be undertaken without Purchaser consent; a non-solicit of employees applies to both parties for six months.
Data Room Access: Virtual data room access will be granted through the Vendor’s portal at https://room.lamanteratai.example using device-bound tokens; illustrative token “DR-TEST-0000” is invalid and for specimen display only.
Generic workforce references: Examples such as “warehouse staff in Selangor” or “junior engineer on rotating shifts” are descriptive only and are not intended to identify any individual.
Long Stop Date and Termination: If Conditions Precedent are not fulfilled or waived by 30 September 2025, either party may terminate without penalty, save for surviving confidentiality, costs, and governing law provisions.
Notices and Contacts: Transaction correspondence to role mailboxes only—Investor Relations: ir@altapura.my; Vendor Deal Team: dealteam@lamanteratai.com; no personal emails or direct lines to be used for official notices.
Governing Law and Dispute Resolution: This term sheet is governed by the laws of Malaysia; parties submit to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Kuala Lumpur, without prejudice to a
